title: ENVIRONMENTAL SERVICES - 211info
text: CITY OF PORTLAND BUREAU OF ENVIRONMENTAL SERVICES ENVIRONMENTAL SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides environmental services that include treating wastewater, storm water drainage services, working watersheds to reduce storm water pollution, restoring native vegetation, and improving water quality in rivers and streams. Manages the Clean River Rewards and storm water utility discount program, where residential and commercial ratepayers may obtain up to a 100% discount of the on-site storm water charge by managing storm water runoff. Offers workshops on storm water management options and discount calculators to help calculate discount. Has a hotline to report pollution or spills. 1120 SW 4th Avenue Portland, OR 972043713 Eligibility: Clean River Rewards: Residential ratepayer participant must own single-family or duplex property; inquire about commercial eligibility Hours: BES Office and Clean River Rewards Hotline: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Automated Clean River Rewards Registration: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (503) 823-7740 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 823-7740 Main phone (503) 823-1371 Clean River Rewards Hotline (503) 823-7761 Sewer Development Services (503) 823-6995 FAX (503) 823-6868 TTY/TTD Main phone (503) 823-7740 Hotline (503) 823-7180 Environmental Services Pollution Control Alternate (503) 823-7761 Sewer Development Services [email protected] Alternate (503) 823-1371 Clean River Rewards [email protected] FAX (503) 823-6995 TTY/TTD (503) 823-6868 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information. Call to register for Clean River Rewards or hotline to report pollution or spills. FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Multnomah County Services: Flood/Siltation Control Residential Energy/Water Conservation Rebates Subject Specific Public Awareness/Education * Energy Conservation Issues If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CITY OF PORTLAND BUREAU OF ENVIRONMENTAL SERVICES
